nasb.text: The sons of Benjamin gathered together behind Abner and became one band, and they stood on the top of a certain hill.

esv.text: And the people of Benjamin gathered themselves together behind Abner and became one group and took their stand on the top of a hill.

cnv.text: 便雅憫人集結在押尼珥後面，站在一座山頭上，列成一個隊伍。

ccb.text: 便雅悯人在押尼珥的带领下聚集在一个山头上。
